issue: rem unit not converted to px in updateMenuMaxHeight()

fix.description: Replaced the broken parseFloat(sideGutterRaw) || 16 with a proper rem-to-px conversion. Now reads the root font-size via getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).fontSize, then checks if the --side-gutter value ends with 'rem' and multiplies accordingly. Falls back to parseFloat() for px values, or 16 if unparseable.
fix.before:
const sideGutterRaw = getComputedStyle( document.documentElement ).getPropertyValue( '--side-gutter' ).trim();
const bottomSpacing = parseFloat( sideGutterRaw ) || 16;

validation.warningDetails: All warnings in unrelated blocks. HeaderMain sync warning expected by design.
